## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to discuss GrowthXLabs website updates, design iterations, and upcoming event preparations.](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homepage updates include new nav bar layout, "How it Works" section redesign, and video integration](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Marcel to provide references for blog, illustrations, and creative assets for presentations/events](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Team to create presentation templates and assets for Marcel's Sept 24th conference (300+ attendees)](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Figma "playground" page created for brainstorming and sharing design ideas](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

## Topics

### Website Design Updates

  - [Nav bar: Blog and Docs buttons now in dropdown menu](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - ["How it Works" section:](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [New illustration approach for 5 phases](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [200 character limit set for descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [Videos integrated into layout (replacing slider)](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Team considering more abstract vs. straightforward illustration style](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [AI-generated headshots discussed for team member images (Marcel to share service used)](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)

### Asset Creation and Event Support

  - [Team to create presentation templates and various creative assets](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Focus on extensible design elements (e.g., backgrounds, shapes, lines) for mix-and-match use](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Inspiration from other brands (e.g., Ramp) for decomposed image style in blogs/social media](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Marcel needs presentation slides for Sept 24th conference (few hundred attendees, SaaS focus)](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)

### Workflow and Communication

  - [Marcel to share references, copy, and creative ideas in Slack channel and Figma "playground" page](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

  - [Weekly meeting time (current slot) confirmed as good for future check-ins](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### Technical Setup

  - [Developer team working on approved sections](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Marcel owns growthx.ai and growthxlabs.com domains (pointed to Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Team to prepare document for DNS and domain setup instructions](https://fathom.video/share/uoWJxHWoNA24Eeh7aytY3Hw_M-Fz56oH?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
